activities.title: Casual Tennis Hit
activities.description: Looking for a quick rally before my afternoon classes. Nothing too serious, just some good casual hits and maybe a game or two if we have time. Bring your own racket!

activities.title: LeetCode & Coffee
activities.description: Struggling with graphs and dynamic programming? Join us at Merlo where we will grind some Leetcode easy/mediums and help each other out. All skill levels welcome!

activities.title: Bouldering Session
activities.description: Projecting some V5-V7s tonight. Would love some strong climbers to project with and share beta. We can grab food nearby afterwards.

activities.title: Photography Walk
activities.description: A casual morning walk through the botanic gardens focusing on macro and landscape photography. Any camera is welcome, including phones!

activities.title: Intro to Machine Learning
activities.description: A beginner-friendly workshop on Machine Learning. We'll build our first linear regression model in Python. Ticket covers pizza!

activities.title: Social Soccer Match
activities.description: Casual 11v11 full pitch game. All genders and skill levels welcome. We play for fun, no aggressive tackles please. Fee covers pitch hire.

messages.text: Awesome, I'm bringing an extra racket if anyone needs.
I managed to grab the large table at the back!
I'll be wearing a red UQ climbing shirt.
Fingers crossed for good weather tomorrow!
Please make sure you have Jupyter Notebook installed prior to the workshop.
We need 4 more people to make it 11v11!
